title: Dresslerella pertusa
taxonomy: Dresslerella pertusa is classified under the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This species belongs to the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, a group of orchids characterized by their unique flower shapes and habits. Dresslerella pertusa is also classified under the genus Dresslerella, a group of orchids named in honor of Robert Dressler, a renowned orchidologist. The classification of Dresslerella pertusa is further supported by its distinctive characteristics, such as its unique flower shape and growth habit. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships between different orchid species.
